acceptance_criteria.description: Site area of 2.5m x 2m is completely cleared of vegetation, rocks, and debris
acceptance_criteria.evidence_instruction: Take 4 photos: one wide-angle shot from each corner of the cleared area showing the full 2.5m x 2m space. Place a visible marker (stake or spray paint) at each corner. Include one photo with a person standing at one edge for scale reference.

acceptance_criteria.description: Ground surface is level and compacted, ready for concrete preparation
acceptance_criteria.evidence_instruction: Photo of spirit level placed across the cleared area from multiple directions (north-south and east-west) showing level ground. Take close-up photo of level bubble centered.
